title: NEO 4.0 AUDIT_RESULT
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P3-A (from the KEPT 4.0 Session-0 draft, P0.1/F4). Live spine schema. AUTHORITY-BEARING: its `recommendation` fills SUBSESSION_END_REPORT.auditor_recommendation_slot, so it is schema-checked like every other authority artifact.
_reconcile: CORRECTION (P0.1/F4): there is NO `audit_result.schema.json` predating this install in the 12-schema spine — the earlier D3 claim that it 'reconciles with spine audit_result.json' was stale and removed. Its neutral artifact CLASS is `evidence` (the cold auditor's produced output), matching the live artifact_classes.json `evidence` glob for `audit_result.json`; it binds to governance only through the common provenance envelope's gate_ref (neo:artifact_provenance convention).

recommendation.description: The cold auditor's verdict. Fills SUBSESSION_END_REPORT.auditor_recommendation_slot.recommendation (D2). Must be NO-GO when rehash_check.all_members_matched=false (see below).

evidence_ref.description: Reference to the bundle member the finding is grounded in (root-relative). Auditor cites artifacts, never master narrative (D3 §1).

findings.description: May be empty for a clean GO. A NO-GO/NEEDS-MORE with an empty findings array is invalid in spirit; downstream gates should treat it as fail-closed (A7).

all_members_matched.description: TRUE iff every allowlisted bundle member re-hashed to its recorded content_hash.

mismatches.description: Root-relative member paths whose re-hash did not match. Non-empty => all_members_matched MUST be false.

rehash_check.description: Bundle-integrity gate (D3 §3). FAIL-CLOSED (A7): if all_members_matched=false, `recommendation` MUST be NO-GO and mismatches MUST name the offending members.

auditor_identity.description: Identity of the independent cold auditor. Distinct from the builder/master (isolation, D3 §1).
